metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins: LSP servers (uvx/npx) and custom agents

plugins.name: pyright-uvx
plugins.description: Python language server (via uvx - always latest)

plugins.name: vtsls-npx
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server (via npx - always latest)

plugins.name: gopls-go
plugins.description: Go language server (requires gopls on PATH)

plugins.name: vscode-html-css-npx
plugins.description: HTML/CSS language servers (via npx - always latest)

plugins.name: rust-analyzer-rustup
plugins.description: Rust language server (requires rust-analyzer via rustup)

plugins.name: dev-guard
plugins.description: Development environment policy enforcement: tool selection guard, commit validation, pre-push review, URL fetch guard, trust management, oc/kubectl introspection, subagent completion verification, decision persistence, anti-deferral enforcement, shared behavioral feedback

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code quality agents, development utilities, and orchestration skills: architecture, security, QA, performance, test execution, code review, code simplification, plan adherence, LSP navigation, uv-python, incremental planning (with issue tracking), roadmap lifecycle management, session management, deep-research (with Bridged mode), business-panel, file-audit, bug-investigation, unfuck, swarm, quality-gate, pr-review, plan-review, map-reduce, speculative, reflect, fix, index-repo, summarize, and test-plan

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git workflow tools: dynamic SessionStart git instructions, history manipulation, commit review, and CONTRIBUTING.md generation

plugins.name: github-mcp
plugins.description: GitHub MCP server with full toolsets for repository management, code security, and workflow automation

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira integration via jira CLI — OSAC defaults with full redhat.atlassian.net support (MCP temporarily disabled)
